mapper.select: -- bgwriter_agg 테이블에서 최근 데이터 조회 SELECT avg_backend_flush_ratio as value, total_buffers_clean as buffersClean, total_buffers_backend as buffersBackend FROM bgwriter_agg WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} ORDER BY collected_at DESC LIMIT 1

-- 시간대별 clean rate 계산 SELECT TO_CHAR(collected_at, 'HH24:MI') as time_label, avg_clean_rate as clean_rate FROM bgwriter_agg WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} ORDER BY collected_at

-- Backend vs Clean 비교 데이터 SELECT TO_CHAR(collected_at, 'HH24:MI') as time_label, total_buffers_backend as backend, total_buffers_clean as clean FROM bgwriter_agg WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} ORDER BY collected_at

-- Maxwritten clean 발생 횟수 SELECT TO_CHAR(collected_at, 'HH24:MI') as time_label, total_maxwritten_clean as maxwritten_clean FROM bgwriter_agg WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} ORDER BY collected_at

-- BGWriter와 Checkpoint가 쓴 버퍼 비교 -- checkpoint_agg 테이블과 조인 필요 SELECT TO_CHAR(b.collected_at, 'HH24:MI') as time_label, b.total_buffers_clean as bgwriter, c.total_buffers_checkpoint as checkpoint FROM bgwriter_agg b LEFT JOIN checkpoint_agg c ON b.instance_id = c.instance_id AND DATE_TRUNC('hour', b.collected_at) = DATE_TRUNC('hour', c.collected_at) WHERE b.instance_id = #{instanceId} AND b.collected_at BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} ORDER BY b.collected_at

-- Buffer 재사용률 계산 SELECT TO_CHAR(collected_at, 'HH24:MI') as time_label, -- 재사용률 계산 로직 필요 100.0 * total_buffers_clean / NULLIF(total_buffers_clean + total_buffers_backend, 0) as reuse_rate FROM bgwriter_agg WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} ORDER BY collected_at

-- 최근 5분 평균 통계 조회 SELECT avg_backend_flush_ratio as bgwriterActivityRate, -- 추가 통계 계산 로직 필요 100.0 * total_buffers_clean / NULLIF(total_buffers_clean + total_buffers_backend, 0) as cleanBufferReuseRate, total_backend_fsync as backendFsyncCount FROM bgwriter_agg WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes' ORDER BY collected_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT instance_id FROM monitor_instance ORDER BY instance_id

SELECT bgwriter_raw_id, instance_id, collected_at, buffers_clean, buffers_backend, buffers_backend_fsync, maxwritten_clean, created_at, buffers_alloc, avg_cycle_time_ms FROM bgwriter_raw WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} ORDER BY collected_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bgwriter_raw ( instance_id, collected_at, buffers_clean, buffers_backend, buffers_backend_fsync, maxwritten_clean, buffers_alloc, avg_cycle_time_ms, created_at ) VALUES ( #{instanceId}, #{collectedAt}, #{buffersClean}, #{buffersBackend}, #{buffersBackendFsync}, #{maxwrittenClean}, #{buffersAlloc}, #{avgCycleTimeMs}, NOW() )

INSERT INTO bgwriter_agg ( instance_id, collected_at, avg_backend_flush_ratio, avg_clean_rate, total_buffers_clean, total_buffers_backend, total_backend_fsync, total_maxwritten_clean, status, avg_cycle_time_ms, created_at ) VALUES ( #{instanceId}, #{collectedAt}, #{avgBackendFlushRatio}, #{avgCleanRate}, #{totalBuffersClean}, #{totalBuffersBackend}, #{totalBackendFsync}, #{totalMaxwrittenClean}, #{status}, #{avgCycleTimeMs}, NOW() )
